name: lwk-js-workspace
description: Workspace for LWK JavaScript and WebAssembly packages

scripts.style:check: npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w wallet_abi_sdk_core_web && npm run build -w helpers_wallet_abi_web && npm run build -w lwk_wallet_abi_sdk && npm run build -w lwk_node
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run prepare:generated && npm run build:packages
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:scripts && npm run typecheck -w wallet_abi_sdk_core_web && npm run typecheck -w helpers_wallet_abi_web && npm run typecheck -w lwk_wallet_abi_sdk && npm run typecheck -w lwk_node
scripts.test: npm run test -w wallet_abi_sdk_core_web && npm run test -w helpers_wallet_abi_web && npm run test -w lwk_wallet_abi_sdk && npm run test -w lwk_node
scripts.pack:check: npm run pack:check -w wallet_abi_sdk_core_web && npm run pack:check -w helpers_wallet_abi_web && npm run pack:check -w lwk_wallet_abi_sdk && npm run pack:check -w lwk_node
scripts.check: LWK_WASM_FEATURES="serial,simplicity" npm run typecheck && LWK_WASM_FEATURES="serial,simplicity" npm run test && LWK_WASM_FEATURES="serial,simplicity" npm run pack:check
